title: Repurposed Structures - Hexerei Compat
description: Change RS Witch Huts to Hexerei's style
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between Repurposed Structures and Hexerei by changing RS's Witch Huts to Hexerei's style! The new styled Witch Huts will still spawn Witched and Black Cats over time and has a bigger bounding box for that. 

- Hexerei mod can be obtained from here: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hexerei

- Repurposed Structures mod can be obtained from here: https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-forge


![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nXngdyOv/images/3cc9ca48d13e496f813e456f0f593f402eabff0e.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nXngdyOv/images/3cc9ca48d13e496f813e456f0f593f402eabff0e.png)


**Note:** for people using CurseForge Launcher to download datapacks, use mods like Global Data & Resourcespacks to automatically load in downloaded datapacks without needing to manually move the datapacks from the resourcepack folder to the correct folders. 
https://modrinth.com/mod/globalpacks
